messages.content: Genera una imagen de un logo minimalista para una app de finanzas

<tool_call>{"name": "generate_image", "arguments": {"prompt": "minimalist logo for finance app, geometric shapes, blue and white color palette, clean lines, professional, vector style, high contrast, simple icon combining growth arrow and shield, modern sans-serif typography", "width": 1024, "height": 1024, "style": "minimalist", "output_path": "~/Pictures/logo_finance.png"}}</tool_call>
Create an image: sunset over mountains, photorealistic

<tool_call>{"name": "generate_image", "arguments": {"prompt": "photorealistic sunset over mountain range, golden hour lighting, dramatic clouds, 8k resolution, cinematic composition, rich warm colors, sharp details, professional landscape photography, f/8 aperture, 35mm lens", "width": 1920, "height": 1080, "style": "photorealistic", "output_path": "~/Pictures/sunset_mountains.png"}}</tool_call>
Convierte el texto a voz: 'Buenos días, hoy es un gran día para aprender'

<tool_call>{"name": "text_to_speech", "arguments": {"text": "Buenos días, hoy es un gran día para aprender", "voice": "es-ES-AlvaroNeural", "speed": 1.0, "pitch": 0, "format": "mp3", "output_path": "~/Music/tts_output.mp3"}}</tool_call>
Generate a YouTube thumbnail for a video about Python tips

<tool_call>{"name": "generate_image", "arguments": {"prompt": "YouTube thumbnail for Python programming tips video, bold text 'PYTHON TIPS 2025', bright colors, python snake logo in background, dark theme, high contrast, eye-catching design, 1280x720px aspect ratio, professional quality, faces if possible showing excitement", "width": 1280, "height": 720, "style": "digital_art", "output_path": "~/Pictures/thumbnail_python.png"}}</tool_call>
Graba la pantalla durante los próximos 30 segundos
<tool_call>{"name": "record_screen", "arguments": {"duration": 30, "output_path": "~/Videos/screen_record_{{datetime}}.mp4", "fps": 30, "include_cursor": true, "include_audio": false}}</tool_call>
Create a short explainer video about AI with voiceover

Creo el pipeline completo: script → imágenes → audio → video.

**Paso 1: Script**
<tool_call>{"name": "ai_process", "arguments": {"prompt": "Write a 30-second explainer script about AI for general audience. Include 3 scene descriptions."}}</tool_call>

**Paso 2: Imágenes por escena**
<tool_call>{"name": "generate_image", "arguments": {"prompt": "[scene_1_description], cinematic quality, 1920x1080"}}</tool_call>

**Paso 3: TTS narración**
<tool_call>{"name": "text_to_speech", "arguments": {"text": "[narration_text]", "voice": "en-US-GuyNeural", "output_path": "/tmp/narration.mp3"}}</tool_call>

**Paso 4: Ensamblar con ffmpeg**
<tool_call>{"name": "exec_command", "arguments": {"command": "ffmpeg -framerate 1/5 -i /tmp/scene_%d.png -i /tmp/narration.mp3 -c:v libx264 -c:a aac ~/Videos/ai_explainer.mp4"}}</tool_call>
Transcribe this audio file

<tool_call>{"name": "exec_command", "arguments": {"command": "whisper {{file_path}} --language auto --model medium --output_format txt --output_dir ~/Documents/transcriptions/", "timeout": 120}}</tool_call>
Crea un GIF animado de un loader para mi web

```python
# Genero el GIF con Pillow
from PIL import Image, ImageDraw
import math

frames = []
for i in range(12):
    img = Image.new('RGBA', (64, 64), (0, 0, 0, 0))
    draw = ImageDraw.Draw(img)
    
    for j in range(8):
        angle = (j * 45 + i * 30) % 360
        rad = math.radians(angle)
        x = 32 + 20 * math.cos(rad)
        y = 32 + 20 * math.sin(rad)
        opacity = int(255 * (j / 8))
        draw.ellipse([x-4, y-4, x+4, y+4], fill=(74, 144, 226, opacity))
    
    frames.append(img)

frames[0].save('loader.gif', save_all=True, append_images=frames[1:], 
               loop=0, duration=80, disposal=2)
```

Guardado como `loader.gif` (64×64px, 12 frames, loop infinito).
Generate an infographic about climate change statistics

```python
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
import numpy as np

fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3, figsize=(18, 8))
fig.patch.set_facecolor('#1a1a2e')
fig.suptitle('Climate Change: Key Statistics 2024', 
             fontsize=22, color='white', fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

# Chart 1: Temperature Rise
ax1 = axes[0]
years = [1880, 1920, 1960, 2000, 2010, 2020, 2024]
temps = [-0.3, -0.1, 0.0, 0.4, 0.7, 1.0, 1.2]
ax1.fill_between(years, temps, alpha=0.3, color='#e74c3c')
ax1.plot(years, temps, color='#e74c3c', linewidth=2.5)
ax1.set_facecolor('#16213e')
ax1.set_title('Global Temperature Rise (°C)', color='white')
ax1.tick_params(colors='gray')

# Chart 2: CO2 levels
ax2 = axes[1]
co2_years = [1960, 1980, 2000, 2010, 2020, 2024]
co2_levels = [316, 338, 369, 389, 412, 422]
ax2.bar(co2_years, co2_levels, color='#f39c12', width=8)
ax2.set_facecolor('#16213e')
ax2.set_title('CO₂ Levels (ppm)', color='white')
ax2.tick_params(colors='gray')

# Chart 3: Ice loss
ax3 = axes[2]
categories = ['Arctic Ice', 'Greenland', 'Antarctic', 'Glaciers']
loss = [13, 280, 150, 390]  # billion tonnes/year
colors = ['#3498db', '#2ecc71', '#9b59b6', '#e67e22']
ax3.pie(loss, labels=categories, colors=colors, autopct='%1.0f%%',
        textprops={'color': 'white'})
ax3.set_title('Annual Ice Loss', color='white')
ax3.set_facecolor('#16213e')

plt.tight_layout()
plt.savefig('~/Documents/climate_infographic.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight',
            facecolor='#1a1a2e')
print('✅ Infographic saved')
```
Toma una captura de pantalla y envíamela

<tool_call>{"name": "screenshot", "arguments": {"output_path": "~/Screenshots/screenshot_{{datetime}}.png", "full_screen": true}}</tool_call>

Convert my MP4 video to GIF

<tool_call>{"name": "exec_command", "arguments": {"command": "ffmpeg -i {{input_file}} -vf 'fps=10,scale=480:-1:flags=lanczos,split[s0][s1];[s0]palettegen[p];[s1][p]paletteuse' -loop 0 {{output_file%.mp4}}.gif", "timeout": 60}}</tool_call>
Extract audio from a video file
<tool_call>{"name": "exec_command", "arguments": {"command": "ffmpeg -i {{video_file}} -vn -acodec mp3 -ab 192k {{video_file%.*}}_audio.mp3", "timeout": 60}}</tool_call>
